app.name: PokouAI
onboarding.subtitle: Detect cocoa diseases in seconds, even offline.
onboarding.consent_body: All analysis happens on your phone. No photo is sent without your consent.
home.group_mode_sub: For extension workers — lesson with a group of farmers
home.intel_sub: Your theories, your results, your lessons. One season = a pocket agronomist.
home.overdue_body: Tap to open the oldest. Take a photo of the same pod.
diagnosis.title: Diagnosis
diagnosis.error_dark: Image too dark. Retake in daylight.
diagnosis.error_blurry: Image blurry. Hold the phone steady.
farmlog.title: Farm log
settings.title: Settings
hub.help: The hub is a village computer running Ollama. Enter its local IP and port 11434.
hub.model_27b_hint: More accurate. Needs beefy hardware (16+ GB RAM).
hub.model_e4b_hint: Lighter. Runs on a modest laptop (8 GB RAM).
learn.takeaway_body: Prevention starts right after harvest. A cleaned plot resists the next rainy season much better.
calendar.subtitle: Recommended preventive actions by season in Côte d'Ivoire.
quiz.empty: No recent diagnosis. Run a diagnosis first.
quiz.try_again: Try again — think of the key symptoms.
group.title: Group mode
group.subtitle: For extension workers teaching a group of farmers.
group.step_1: Show the pod to the group
group.step_2: Take the photo — diagnosis is read aloud
group.step_3: Explain the treatment, run the quiz together
group.note_no_save: Group mode does not save to your personal log.
hypothesis.prompt_body: What do you think caused this? We'll check together in 7 days.
hypothesis.scheduled_body: On {{date}} we'll check together if your treatment worked.
hypothesis.reminder_body: 7 days ago you treated {{disease}}. Take a photo of the same area to check.
followup.title: Day 7 check
followup.subtitle: Initial diagnosis: {{disease}}. Let's compare with today.
followup.lesson_placeholder: e.g. after 3 rainy days, inspect shaded pods within 48h.
followup.compare_failed: Comparison unavailable — go by what you see.
intel.empty: No loops yet. Run a diagnosis, state a theory, and come back in 7 days for your first lesson.
speech.unavailable_body: Dioula and Baoulé voice synthesis is coming soon. Switch to French or English in Settings to hear the diagnosis read aloud.
